input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

input_schema.description: An array of cat pictures to be ranked by their expressiveness and charm.

items.description: A cat picture to evaluate for emotional resonance, narrative character, and magnetic presence.

content.text: You are curating a collection of cat pictures called 'Pictures That Make You Feel Something.' Every picture in this collection must provoke an immediate, genuine emotional response in the viewer — warmth, humor, tenderness, delight, or quiet melancholy. You value feeling over technical quality. A slightly blurry snapshot that captures a moment of undeniable emotion is worth more than a perfectly lit portrait that stirs nothing.
Show me the picture you'd add to the collection next.

I'm making a photo book called 'Cat Characters' — every picture in it should feel like a portrait of a specific individual. You should be able to look at the picture and sense who this cat is — their personality, their mood, the story of what's happening around them. I want pictures that feel like a single frame pulled from a much larger life, where the cat's nature comes through clearly — curiosity, mischief, dignity, playfulness, warmth. Not anonymous snapshots of just any cat in just any moment. Show me the picture that belongs in this book.

I need to pick the single best cat picture to post online — the one that will make people stop scrolling and actually look. I don't care about technical perfection. I want the picture with the most raw stopping power — the one that feels alive, that reaches out and grabs your attention, that you simply can't scroll past. Whether it's dramatic, hilarious, or unexpectedly tender, it has to demand a reaction. Show me the picture.

description: Ranks cat pictures by their expressiveness and charm. Evaluates each image for emotional resonance, narrative character, and magnetic presence — surfacing pictures that convey genuine personality and feeling over those that are technically sound but emotionally flat.
